scope: current Desktop domain-chip portfolio as discovered by spark-domain-chip-labs on 2026-03-21
sources: PYTHONPATH=src python -c "from chip_labs.registry import discover_chips; import json; print(json.dumps(discover_chips(), indent=2))"

top_tier.why_it_leads: Best balanced operating depth in the current portfolio with real artifact volume, vault depth, and no current anti-gaming flags.
Strong evidence integrity and trajectory quality, but currently carries the single_day_batch anti-gaming flag.
Massive artifact and vault volume with credible operating depth.
Good doctrine quality and evidence distribution, though still light on realworld_validated depth.

critical_findings.finding: The portfolio has a strong top tier but a weak floor: 11 of 19 scored chips are still alpha or scaffold.
The growth chip cluster is mostly structural shell with little or no operating evidence. Four chips are flagged high_structure_low_velocity and several have zero artifact and zero vault depth.
One discovered directory is not a valid chip at all: domain-chip-predictive-worlds-lab-spark-scaffold has no manifest or project file and should not be treated as active portfolio inventory.
xcontent is near the top of the portfolio but currently carries the single_day_batch anti-gaming flag, so its momentum should be treated as suspicious until spread across real time.
Several mid-tier chips are beta by score but still missing contradiction rigor or watchtower depth, which means they are broader than they are intellectually grounded.

recommended_actions: Treat startup-yc, xcontent, pokemon-red, content, agentic-marketing, and spark-private as the active portfolio leadership set.
Stop counting the growth scaffold cluster as proof of portfolio maturity until each chip has real runs, doctrines, and evidence-lane content.
Quarantine or archive invalid inventory like domain-chip-predictive-worlds-lab-spark-scaffold from portfolio narratives.
Run a dedicated anti-gaming review on xcontent before using it as a transfer source.
Pick one or two growth chips to mature fully instead of carrying six low-signal variants in parallel.
